longBusinessSummary: SECOM CO., LTD., together with its subsidiaries, provides security services in Japan and internationally. The company operates through Security Services, Fire Protection Services, Medical Services, Insurance Services, Geospatial Information Services, BPO and ICT Services, and Others segment. Its Security Services segment offers static guard, armored car, merchandise, and other services, as well as online security systems. The Fire Protection Services segment provides fire alarm systems, fire extinguishing systems, and maintenance services to office buildings, production facilities, tunnels, cultural properties, ships, and residences. Its Medical Services segment offers home medical services, including home nursing services and pharmaceutical dispensing services and home delivery services; operation of residences for seniors; sales of electronic medical report systems, medical equipment, and pharmaceutical products; personal care services, and the leasing of real estate for medical institutions. The Insurance Services Segment provides fire insurance, automobile insurance, and cancer treatment insurance services. Its Geospatial Information Services segment offers geospatial information services to national and local governments; private sector customers; and overseas government agencies. The BPO and ICT Services segment provides business continuity planning (BCP) support, information security services, cloud-based services and authentication services centering on the data centers, as well as BPO-related services including operation of contact center services. Its Other Services segment offers real estate leasing, construction, and installation services. The company was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Shibuya, Japan.
